rationale: The citing paper is a conceptual rejoinder that explicitly states it is responding to Ariely, Huber, and Wertenbroch (2005), and it discusses the cited paper’s proposed mediators (emotional attachment and cognitive focus) in detail. Both notes describe mechanism-level debate about when intentions moderate loss aversion, indicating substantive theoretical engagement rather than a passing mention. The DOI match is exact (10.1509/jmkr.42.2.134.62283), supporting that this is the intended focal target.
